name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Banks?=
subject: One more week
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friend,

The election is only one week away, and we really need your help in this final stretch.

[Will you chip in $7 today for our final 7 days?](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=f9cd3c328d&e=bfe3be83a5)
[](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=0499265263&e=bfe3be83a5)
As you know, there is a lot on the line next Tuesday. **Democrats in Indiana and across the country are eager to flip the House and put Nancy Pelosi in the Speaker's chair, but I'm working hard to fight back against their out-of-touch liberal agenda and defend our conservative Hoosier values.**

Every dollar raised this week will go directly toward our critical "Get Out the Vote" efforts to keep our district red on November 6.

[Can I count on your support?](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=f235bef8f2&e=bfe3be83a5)

Working for you,

Jim
---

name: Kathy Manning
subject: What this campaign means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
I know that politics can be discouraging. There is so much pressure and stress on the midterm elections. It seems like every day a new media outlet says this race couldn't be closer and then special i
|
---

| | I know that politics can be discouraging. There is so much pressure and stress on the midterm elections. It seems like every day a new media outlet says this race couldn't be closer and then special interests come and pour in hundreds of thousands of dollars. But let me tell you -- I have never been more encouraged by this campaign. Our headquarters are filled with generations of volunteers who are all committed to make North Carolina a better place. We are talking to hundreds of voters each and every day who remind me why I decided to run in the first place. [**We are hitting our fundraising goals with grassroots efforts like this: an average online contribution of $18!**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542793f/e3b7d3/5e7b1c38/25556000/263785914/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181030pm?refcode=kme181030pm_m") To me, this campaign is an opportunity to take back a seat for North Carolina families. It is an opportunity to increase access to health care. It is an opportunity to create more jobs and strengthen our economy. [**We have an opportunity to win. But we are going to need your help. Will you make a contribution before our October 31st deadline?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542793f/e3b7d3/5e7b1c38/25556000/263785914/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181030pm?refcode=kme181030pm_m") This campaign means something different for Rep. Ted Budd, President Trump, and special interests. It is an opportunity for them to continue with smear campaigns and baseless attack ads. They see it as an opportunity to buy this seat. **I know I can count on you to not let that happen.[We still need $4,500 before tomorrow to hit our goal. Will you please consider making a contribution?](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542793f/e3b7d3/5e7b1c38/25556000/263785914/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181030pm?refcode=kme181030pm_m")** Thanks,
Kathy
---

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

name: betofortexas.com
subject: most important week of the entire election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Time is running out to make a difference in this race -- but a brand-new
poll this week shows Beto ‘within striking distance.’ We’ve gained four
points since the beginning of the month.

This much is clear: Our strategy is working, but we have to keep pressing
aggressively.

There’s only one week left before the polls close. It’s the most important
week of this entire election. If we make an epic grassroots push now, we
can push Beto over the top. But it will take all of us, so we’re asking
for your help, urgently.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181030&t=1019&akid=22791%2E444211%2Ej2MyYN ]Can you rush a
$3
contribution or more to Beto’s campaign tonight? Help us keep the momentum
surging -- until we can surpass Cruz.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181030&t=1020&akid=22791%2E444211%2Ej2MyYN ]Contribute
$3
»

While the Cruz campaign is backed by corporate special interests and big
PACs pouring millions of dollars into Texas, we’re mobilizing grassroots
supporters at historic levels. Pure grassroots organizing is how we’ve
gotten so close to winning.

We’re channeling every single contribution directly into: 1) our biggest
voter contact mobilization effort of the whole campaign -- the final four
days before Election Day, and 2) boosting Beto’s positive vision for Texas
across every media outlet possible, across the airwaves and online.

Thanks to your contributions, we’ve already reached millions of Texas
voters. But there are still millions more to reach, and we’re running out
of time. We have to get more resources to our field program and ads team
immediately.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181030&t=1021&akid=22791%2E444211%2Ej2MyYN ]We can’t afford to fall short of our end-of-month fundraising goal.
We’ve come too far -- and are too close to winning -- to let this slip
away now. Can Beto count on you to pitch in now, before the month is out?

We have the guts, determination and sheer numbers to win.

Let’s do this.

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181030&t=1022&akid=22791%2E444211%2Ej2MyYN ]Contribute
$3
»

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=22791%2E444211%2Ej2MyYN

P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: These races are CLOSE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
There are just seven days left until the midterm election and I cannot overstate just how much is at stake.
#
Friends,
There are just seven days left until the midterm election and I cannot overstate just how much is at stake. **Liz Watson** in Indiana, **Dana Balter** and **Liuba Grechen Shirley** in New York, and **J.D. Scholten** in Iowa all have a serious shot at unseating their Republican representatives. They are just a few of the 33 Our Revolution-endorsed congressional candidates running inspiring, progressive campaigns across this country. You can have a direct impact on the outcome of their races and help usher in a new blue wave of progressive leaders.
With the resources to reach voters in these districts, Our Revolution can get out the vote for progressives like Liz, Dana, Liuba and J.D. who will advance policies like Medicare for All, a $15 minimum wage, tuition-free college and more. Reclaiming the House of Representatives - and advancing our progressive agenda - will rest on the outcome of districts like these on Tuesday.
**[Will you split a critical $5 donation to help these candidates and Our Revolution's Get Out The Vote effort over the next seven days? Your contribution will help turn out voters for progressive candidates and ballot initiatives across the country.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a869/bed43eb/8eb79479/75fc232c/2222321234/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/progressive-congress?refcode=em181030-a&noskip=true")**
When you donate to Our Revolution, you are helping to elect candidates at every level of government. You can supercharge grassroots organizing efforts to build long-lasting political power, elevate the next generation of progressive activists, and expand what is possible in communities across the country. You do not just fundraise, you people-raise. That's revolutionary.
Locally organized grassroots groups are essential to taking a stand against hatred and bigotry. In Iowa, J.D.'s opponent Steve King has spent his time in Congress attacking groups of people based on their race, ethnicity, religion, and sexual orientation. You can help put a stop to it.
We will win because love is more powerful than fear. We will win because no matter one's party affiliation or where they come from, no one wants to have their voice drowned out by the 1 percent who flood money into our elections. These past few weeks I have been traveling the country with Senator Bernie Sanders to get out the vote, and I believe we are on the verge of transforming this country. I have seen it in your faces, at rallies, and in early voting locations. We can win the political revolution at the ballot box, but in order to maximize turnout to make that possible I have one request:
**[Can you split a $5 contribution to help Liz, Dana, Liuba, J.D., and Our Revolution elect a new generation of progressives to Congress? Help us Get Out The Vote for more than 150 state and local candidates over these final days. Chip in here.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a869/bed43eb/8eb79479/75fc232c/2222321234/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/progressive-congress?refcode=em181030-a&noskip=true")**
Thank you for keeping the political revolution going.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a869/bed43eb/8eb79479/75fc232c/2222321234/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/progressive-congress?refcode=em181030-a&noskip=true")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a869/bed43eb/8eb79479/75fc232f/2222321234/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a869/bed43eb/8eb79479/75fc232e/2222321234/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a869/bed43eb/8eb79479/75fc2329/2222321234/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a869/bed43eb/8eb79479/75fc2328/2222321234/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Donnelly, Joe
subject: just walked off the debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Rep. Mike Braun and I just made our closing arguments in the final debate of this election. Now I'm asking you to chip in to our end-of-month goal so our team has the resources to make our final push |
---
[]()

| | Fox News:
**" Donnelly, Braun trading lead as polls show Indiana Senate race a dead heat"** Peter, Rep. Mike Braun and I just made our closing arguments in the final debate of this election. [**Now I 'm asking you to chip in to our end-of-month goal so our team has the resources to make our final push.**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2a44/7377f838/270f71be/51ff5fb3/252384833/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-quad-match?refcode=20181030.4&amount=20")

We may never stand face-to-face again, but tonight was all the proof we needed: Rep. Braun and I couldn't be more different. In the Senate, I've fought to help Hoosiers, protected health care, and opposed McConnell's tax bill.

Rep. Braun won't protect health care for people with pre-existing conditions. He thinks McConnell's tax scam is great because it benefits extremely wealthy people, like him. It's clear he's ready to serve as a copy machine for President Trump if he wins.

**But he won 't, if we have anything to say about it. I'm working day and night to win this race, and I can't do it without you. Will you pitch in to help us reach our final end-of-month goal? All gifts are being quadruple matched until tomorrow's midnight deadline.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump and First Lady visit Tree of Life Synagogue in Pittsburgh
body:
The White House | October 30, 2018

** President Trump and First Lady visit Tree of Life Synagogue in Pittsburgh
------------------------------------------------------------

In the immediate aftermath of Saturday’s anti-Semitic attack, President Donald J. Trump condemned the shooting as an act of “pure evil” and called on the Nation to come together as one people united in a struggle for justice, safety, tolerance, and love.

Today, the President and First Lady visited Pittsburgh to meet with family members of the victims and mourn the loss of life with the entire community.

Their first stop was the Tree of Life Synagogue, where 11 Jewish Americans were murdered during a baby-naming ceremony Saturday morning. Accompanied by Rabbi Jeffrey Myers, President Trump and the First Lady walked alongside one another, placing a white flower and small stone on each of the 11 stars erected in a makeshift memorial outside the synagogue. Ivanka Trump and Jared Kushner followed a few steps behind, pausing at each star.

Inside the synagogue, the President and First Lady lit candles for each of the 11 victims.

Before leaving Pittsburgh, President Trump visited with wounded law enforcement officers and injured victims at the University of Pittsburgh Medical Center’s Presbyterian Hospital. “These were very brave officers. These are incredible people of law enforcement,” the President said after the attack on Saturday. “They’re really unsung heroes.”

Photo: President Trump and the First Lady pay respects to each of the 11 victims. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c54c0ab5da&e=3ee4985eea)

More: President Trump talks with Laura Ingraham about Saturday's attack (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d4ff0da177&e=3ee4985eea)

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
Photo of the day

** Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
------------------------------------------------------------

Marine One, carrying President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump, approaches for a landing at Joint Base Andrews to begin their trip to Pittsburgh. | October 30, 2018

Privacy Policy (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0616270f0e&e=3ee4985eea) | Contact the White House (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d562990f8b&e=3ee4985eea) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=a01fdbe4b2)

The White House
1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW
Washington, DC 20500
USA | 202-456-1111

body:
Make sure you've mailed back your ballot by tomorrow! |
---
| | Are you voting by mail?

**Make sure you mail back your ballot by _Wednesday, October 31st_!

[Forward this email to 3 friends to make sure they've mailed back their ballots too or have a plan to vote in-person.](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d07fb/45aebd3c/50d73508/2caa2678/2012912342/VEsH/ "https://vote.kyrstensinema.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+Forward+this+email+to+3+friends+to+make+&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_181030_7_7&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_181030_7_7&refcode=KS_EM_FR_B90D_181030_7_7")**
---

Friend, if you're voting by mail, **make sure to complete your ballot and mail it back by tomorrow, Wednesday, October 31! If you mail it back any later, your ballot may not count -- so don 't miss out on voting in this historic election**.

Arizonans are voting in record numbers this year. We need all hands on deck to help Kyrsten win this election so she can keep fighting for all of us in the Senate.

With polls saying this Senate race is a dead heat, every vote could be the difference between a win and a loss for Kyrsten. This election is just too important to sit it out. So take action now!

**Mail back your ballot by Wednesday, October 31st.**
If you don't mail your ballot by tomorrow, you can drop it off at any early voting location this week or any polling place on Election Day -- no need to wait in line or show ID.

**[Click here to see voting locations and hours so you can make a plan to drop off your ballot or to vote in-person.](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d07fb/45aebd3c/50d73508/2caa2679/2012912342/VEsE/ "https://vote.kyrstensinema.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+see+voting+locations+and+h&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_B90D_181030_7_7&source=KS_EM_FR_B90D_181030_7_7&refcode=KS_EM_FR_B90D_181030_7_7")**

Team Sinema HQ

subject: fwd: We're exactly one week from Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Linda needs your help to make sure we're in full fighting shape for the most important stretch of campaigning. [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181030_One-Week-fwd_EM&amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Peter, did you see Linda's earlier message?

**With just one week left until all votes are cast, we need all hands on deck to bring this home for Democrats in California.

[We're $17,817 from our last grassroots fundraising goal of the election. Can you pitch in to make sure we hit our goal by November 5?](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181030_One-Week-fwd_EM&amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Thank you,

Sanchez for Congress

**\---- ORIGINAL MESSAGE ----** Peter,

Exactly one week from today, voters across the country will choose a new Congress. I've been working hard to create a big blue wave in California that will carry Democrats to victory in several key House races -- **and I need your help to make sure we 're in full fighting shape for the final 7 days of campaigning.**

**[So to mark this last week, I'm asking you to give just $7 -- or more if you can!](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181030_One-Week-fwd_EM&amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** | | ******[DONATE $7 OR MORE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181030_One-Week-fwd_EM&amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******
---
Think back to two years ago. If you knew a week before Election Day 2016 what the final result would be, what would you have done differently?

I would have knocked on more doors, made more calls, and worked even harder to support Democrats up and down the ballot.

**Reaching voters in critical swing districts depends on our volunteers having reliable transportation and enough pens, clipboards, and water to hit all of their goals!** We're relying on grassroots donations of $7, $70, or even $700 to keep our efforts in full swing.

[**Click here to donate to keep us on the path to victory in 7 days >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181030_One-Week-fwd_EM&amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Let's do this!

Linda
**Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181030_One-Week-fwd_EM&amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Contributions or gifts to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez are not tax deductible.

[**Click here**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503669d/4ac3d62d/69f640fe/1ce29b26/3085675505/VEsP/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages and enter dpwillis67@gmail.com so we can unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: voting is underway
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
This is critical, Friends: We have until 6 p.m. today to raise the $45,000 we need to keep our TV ads up, and **we're falling dangerously short.
**
Nevadans are _already _casting ballots in the race that experts say will decide control of the Senate and the future of the Supreme Court, and right now, our race is the only toss-up in the country.
**
So if our ads go dark this close to Election Day, we will lose this race. **
This is crunch time, Friends. Our team is making decisions hour by hour about what we can fund. The GOP is bombarding our state with millions from Mitch McConnell. And we can't fund our ads and take back the Senate without you.

Democrats cannot take back the Senate if we lose in Nevada, but time is running out before our critical deadline.** If you want to take back the Senate for Democrats, you need to give now to keep our ads live and win in Nevada:**
[**Please, rush $5 - before our 6 p.m. deadline - to keep our ads on the air so we can win in Nevada and take back the Senate for Democrats!**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4jr?refcode=jtk901-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be evenly split between Jacky Rosen and Jeanne Shaheen and will go through immediately:_ **[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4jr?refcode=jtk901-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4jr?refcode=jtk901-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4jr?refcode=jtk901-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4jr?refcode=jtk901-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thanks for coming through when it really matters.

Jacky

name: Team Tabitha
subject: Regret is a scary thing.
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/TI-Email-Theme-Header.png]

Today is Halloween, so I've been thinking about the things that scare me (and perhaps you too).

- The rise of white nationalism
- Beloved children of God dying from lack of healthcare
- Seniors having to choose between paying utilities and buying groceries
- Children growing up without hope of a bright future
- The incredible number of veterans who commit suicide

We can't fix these big issues overnight, but November 6th is an opportunity to take a major step in the right direction.

You know what else scares me? I'm scared that I'm not doing enough. I'm scared that I'll wake up the morning after the election and think of something else I could have done.

Now is the time to act. Sign up to knock on doors or make phone calls to remind Tabitha supporters to come out to the polls. You can do it from anywhere in the country, so don't let distance keep you from chipping in.

- Megan Skipper, Campaign Manager

Regret is a scary thing. Don't wake up on November 7th wishing you'd done more.
Volunteer Now! https://tabithaisner.com/volunteernow/

Connect With Us:
Call the office at 334-425-8626
Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/TabithaIsner]
Twitter [http://www.twitter.com/TabithaK]

Checks made out to "Friends of Tabitha Isner" can be sent to:
PO Box 6340
Montgomery, AL 36106

Campaign HQ Address:
1460 Ann St.
Montgomery, AL 36107

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: The "Patronis Spell" ✨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uX4v9ceBSQJcYDd_sxiqgBsaRwSG9pL6aCC0IjgFm54=/NRMzGGjBKd816doNiiAiR_TB-7j4h1vCcx0f6U4FQmI=) Friends and Neighbors -- In the make believe world of Harry Potter, a patronus is a "defensive charm." In Rick Scott's make believe world of "everything is great in Florida", a Patronis is a CFO he appointed, one that he should be very defensive of indeed. My opponent, Jimmy Patronis, has been an ardent supporter of the governor since his 2010 campaign - and has been little more than a rubber stamp for Scott and the Tallahassee GOP in the Cabinet since being appointed CFO. As the _Miami Herald_ recently pointed out in their **[endorsement of our campaign](https://act.myngp.com/el/uX4v9ceBSQJcYDd_sxiqgBsaRwSG9pL6aCC0IjgFm54=/VqISOS_6J4xAw0BBDuGDGTWoOEcVOItKump_X2Z-25Y=)** , "...there is little to nothing in Patronis' professional background that makes him a candidate worthy of support for the important position of CFO." It's no secret that Governor Scott will do everything he can to make sure his hand-picked choice for CFO remains in the position. **The question, coming up in 6 short days is: Do you want another 4 years of the tired Rick Scott style of thinking, or do you want a new innovative approach to governing? ** Don't let Rick Scott cast his Patronis spell on the people of Florida... [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uX4v9ceBSQJcYDd_sxiqgBsaRwSG9pL6aCC0IjgFm54=/5MPoM36g7BIt1iilbBjRuUXkk11GKsJf4OmKPGbUPRw=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) As your next CFO, I would make ensuring that your tax payer dollars are being spent the way you were promised they would be - and that your state government is working for _YOU_ , not political cronies or special interests groups - a top priority. But I have an election to win first - and we only have 6 days left. **But our very last End of Month fundraising deadline for this campaign is coming up in just a few hours. ** **[Can you contribute $20.18 by midnight, so that we can win this thing - and that I can get our Cabinet back to working for _you_?](https://act.myngp.com/el/uX4v9ceBSQJcYDd_sxiqgBsaRwSG9pL6aCC0IjgFm54=/5MPoM36g7BIt1iilbBjRuUXkk11GKsJf4OmKPGbUPRw=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all of your support - and Happy Halloween! **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---
Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer
PO Box 670311
Coral Springs FL 33067 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/uX4v9ceBSQJcYDd_sxiqgBsaRwSG9pL6aCC0IjgFm54=/eqknBRzkbabeO0qQ6-PyOk_IH-xOoWzauvbVaEUJVDY=).

.

The question, coming up in 6 short days is: Do you want another 4 years of the tired Rick Scott style of thinking, or do you want a new innovative approach to governing? Don't let Rick Scott cast his Patronis spell on the people of Florida... & As your next CFO, I would make ensuring that your tax payer dollars are being spent the way you were promised they would be - and that your state government is working for YOU , not political cronies or special interests groups - a top priority. But I have an election to win first - and we only have 6 days left. But our very last End of Month fundraising deadline for this campaign is coming up in just a few hours. & Thank you for all of your support - and Happy Halloween! Jeremy Ring | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer PO Box 670311 Coral Springs FL 33067 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. .

body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Sorry to
email so early -- some really big news broke late last night and I wanted
to get it over to you first thing this morning.

A brand-new poll from the University of Texas at Tyler shows Beto behind
Ted Cruz among likely voters by a slim 3.6 points.

This is HUGE news with less than one week until Election Day. We need to
jump on this news fast. We can close this gap.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181031&t=1019&akid=22829%2E444211%2EE43XiU ]Quick: pitch in a contribution
of
$3
or more to Beto’s campaign and help us reach as many Texans as possible in
these final six days.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181031&t=1020&akid=22829%2E444211%2EE43XiU ]Contribute
$3
»

There’s so much momentum on our side: Beto absolutely crushed his town
hall on MSNBC last night, sharing the values we’re all fighting for in
this campaign across the state. Texans are voting early in record-breaking
numbers. And poll after poll shows what you and I know to be true: Beto
can win this race.

But it'll only happen if enough people step up and help him do it at the
moment it matters most. We can’t let this day pass us by -- not with so
much on the line, and not with November 6 so soon.

Talk soon,

Chris Evans

name: Keren, Campaign Manager
subject: I hate asking this, but I'll just get it over with
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek -- I hate having to keep asking you for money like this, really, I do.

But we need to raise even more than we initially planned for Tim's re-election. **With House seats in Virginia getting closer than ever predicted, Vice President Pence getting involved, and control of the House hanging in the balance -- we need to step it up with more ads, more organizing, and more outreach.**

So our goals have expanded, and some of the most watched House candidates in the country are depending on us raising this money and funding the final Get Out the Vote (GOTV) push in Virginia.

**Here 's a link from our finance team that will go directly to these statewide efforts. I promise you, Derek, donating a few bucks to this link could be a deciding factor in Democrats taking a majority in six days:** [https://secure.timkaine.com/Emergency-October-Goal](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1085/3e0906/75af4b55/3e371830/4012983125/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181031_1_FR_KCD_hate-asking-ldnd&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimkainecomEmergencyOctoberGo&utm_campaign=20181031_1_FR_KCD_hate-asking-ldnd&source=20181031_1_FR_KCD_hate-asking-ldnd")

I'm checking in with Tim regularly to talk about whether we're going to make this goal tonight and I would love to tell him the good news: That grassroots supporters have helped us accomplish what so many are depending on us to do.

Thank you,

_Keren_
Campaign Manager, Tim Kaine 2018 | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1085/3e0906/75af4b55/3e371837/4012983125/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181031_1_FR_KCD_hate-asking-ldnd&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181031_1_FR_KCD_hate-asking-ldnd&source=20181031_1_FR_KCD_hate-asking-ldnd")

body:
Hey, I just got off the phone with Steve -- and he specifically asked us to send this message to folks like you, friend.

Your support is critical to winning this thing and Steve was wondering if you are able to donate today. With the FINAL fundraising deadline before we shift to getting out the vote full-time, he needs us to close this fundraising gap and prepare for these final days.

Adam Laxalt and his Koch-network backers are doing everything they can to buy this race for Donald Trump. But we can neutralize their millions of dollars if grassroots supporters like you step up and chip in whatever you can right now.

We set up a special link for you to use so that Steve can be notified when your contribution goes through:

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Oprah.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Oprah Winfrey is officially on #TeamAbrams, and she's coming to Georgia. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7a0/34a064cc/909cfa/70c9b12/698798337/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Dear Friend - We'll get right to it. Oprah Winfrey is officially on #TeamAbrams, and she's coming to Georgia to help us Get Out The Vote for Stacey! On Thursday, November 1, the trailblazing talk show host and global media pioneer will join us to share why she believes Stacey Abrams is the best candidate to represent all of Georgia and what we must do in the next six days to ensure a victory. This race is tighter than ever, and the outcome will be decided by a handful of votes. Oprah knows how important it is we ALL step up to help turn out our voters. Together, we can ensure that all Georgians know that their voices matter. Will you join us? We will host two town halls TOMORROW: **What:** Town Hall Conversation with Oprah Winfrey and Stacey Abrams
**Where:** Marietta, GA
**When:** Thursday, November 1, 2018
Doors open at
11:00 AM **What:** Town Hall Conversation with Oprah Winfrey and Stacey Abrams
**Where:** Decatur, GA
**When:** Thursday, November 1, 2018
Doors open at
2:30 PM Tickets are limited and will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis. They are free and open to the public, but you must be on the RSVP list to enter. **[Each individual must request tickets HERE by Wednesday, October 31 at 5pm.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7a0/34a064cc/909cfa/70c9b13/698798337/VEsE/ "https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/content/convo-with-oprah/")** Join us on Thursday, November 1, and let's get out the vote for Stacey Abrams! See you there, Team Abrams

name: James Carville
subject: something special
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
I've worked in politics for a long, long, long time. And let me tell you: This election year is shaping up to be something special.
| | Peter, I've worked in politics for a long, long,_long_ time. And let me tell you: This election year is shaping up to be something special. Democrats are fired up. They're knocking their neighbors' doors and they're enthusiastic to get out and vote in November. **But that doesn 't mean much without someone to vote _for_ \-- and, fortunately, there are some _really_ talented candidates running in swing districts everywhere this year.** You're familiar with one of them -- Abigail Spanberger, who is running one heck of a campaign down in Central Virginia. Peter, I'll get right to it: Abigail needs your support to win in November. [**Can you make a donation of any size right here to help Abigail flip VA-7 blue?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3W0mjnuqhUtKbtDBNuguViNbbD9FmpN5v4aJOjHa-_w=/dtZtr5VMOo_NbtgGHhhqJSfVM8oMVSXPzDiyJLA4LhY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b1_jc_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Now, when I say that Abigail needs your support, here's what I mean. The election is only 6 days away, and the end of the month is coming up at midnight. This is the last big deadline before the election -- so [**your support today**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3W0mjnuqhUtKbtDBNuguViNbbD9FmpN5v4aJOjHa-_w=/dtZtr5VMOo_NbtgGHhhqJSfVM8oMVSXPzDiyJLA4LhY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b1_jc_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) will ensure that she has a strong showing. The campaign finance world has changed a lot since I entered politics, mostly for the worse. With Super PACs allowed to spend unlimited sums of money to influence our elections, grassroots donations are especially critical to making sure Democrats like Abigail can compete. [**Every dollar matters, Peter, so help Abigail out if you can!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3W0mjnuqhUtKbtDBNuguViNbbD9FmpN5v4aJOjHa-_w=/dtZtr5VMOo_NbtgGHhhqJSfVM8oMVSXPzDiyJLA4LhY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b1_jc_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, \- James Carville [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3W0mjnuqhUtKbtDBNuguViNbbD9FmpN5v4aJOjHa-_w=/dtZtr5VMOo_NbtgGHhhqJSfVM8oMVSXPzDiyJLA4LhY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b1_jc_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3W0mjnuqhUtKbtDBNuguViNbbD9FmpN5v4aJOjHa-_w=/dtZtr5VMOo_NbtgGHhhqJSfVM8oMVSXPzDiyJLA4LhY=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/3W0mjnuqhUtKbtDBNuguViNbbD9FmpN5v4aJOjHa-_w=/6pDer3NemduEfIFe86EaelykwmT8eKY9dTgUXvHccbo=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

Hey there, did you see Heidi's note?
NBC and CBS have called her the most vulnerable Democrat in the entire country, and McConnell even told The Washington Post that Senate control will be decided in North Dakota.
We have 6 days left to turn this around. Heidi's not giving up, and neither should you. Everyone from NBC to CBS has called me the most vulnerable Democratic senator in the entire country. But with this team behind me, you can bet I'm not giving up.

name: Jason Yates
subject: Is America headed in the right direction?
body:
|
---
| **_“This is not about Democrats and Republicans; this is not all horizontal, left right, liberal conservative, Democrat or Republican. I like to think of politics as it should be, up or down. It’s good or bad. It takes us more toward God or further from Him.”
_****– Mike Huckabee** Megan West, host of My Faith Votes LIVE, had the opportunity to sit down with Gov. Mike Huckabee for a one-on-one conversation. Taking place on the set for the 'Huckabee' show, in Nashville, TN. Megan and Mike discussed a wide range of current topics ranging from "_Is America headed in the right direction?_ " to "_Why should Christians care about politics, if God is in control?_ " to "_Can we really live at peace with those whom we disagree?_ " They even had the opportunity to talk about what it's like for Mike to be Sarah Huckabee Sanders' dad. Don’t miss this [exclusive interview](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzQexMqOHAvp85JM7mbEYhideSC0GLt3vvFV2Mg60hUTKyxbWtnXtX0lskatWYBhffBUWXnS-J8igRb-55cXjN9Y&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181031mfvl01&n=1) and hear from our favorite Governor and learn how he thinks Christians should approach the midterm elections! name: Bob Corney, Bredesen for Senate
subject: Too close to call (new poll)
body:
|
#
**Peter, a new NBC/Marist poll just came out that once again shows our race is too close to call.** I don’t like it when we email you about polls, because as I’ve told you before, the only poll that really matters is on Election Day. But these polls do help make it clear what we’ve known all along -- this race will be neck-and-neck until the very end. It is clear that Tennesseans are tired of partisan shouting and are ready for some fresh air and fresh ideas in Washington. Governor Bredesen's message of working together to get things done continues to resonate with Democrats, Independents, and Republicans throughout the state. **But we know that we're up against millions of dollars in false attack ads hitting undecided voters right now.** While we’re working nonstop to get folks to the polls, we can’t afford to sit back without setting the record straight. That’s why I’ve gotta ask for your help again: **Add a donation of $10 or whatever you can right now so we can stand up to these false attacks against Phil Bredesen in the last days of this campaign. clean_body: | Peter, a new NBC/Marist poll just came out that once again shows our race is too close to call. I don’t like it when we email you about polls, because as I’ve told you before, the only poll that really matters is on Election Day. But these polls do help make it clear what we’ve known all along -- this race will be neck-and-neck until the very end. It is clear that Tennesseans are tired of partisan shouting and are ready for some fresh air and fresh ideas in Washington. Governor Bredesen's message of working together to get things done continues to resonate with Democrats, Independents, and Republicans throughout the state. But we know that we're up against millions of dollars in false attack ads hitting undecided voters right now. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
This is it.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379124/7ab0e2c4/7e61a988/3499bd66/2755611942/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-deadline?refcode=OHQ10318A") Friend -- You don't need a reminder that today's Halloween, but I figured it might be worth reminding you what's really scary: We're up against a corporate-funded opponent who wants to keep Maryland "the same" -- but as healthcare payments pile up, student loans pile up, and wages stay flat for most families, "the same" is not good enough. In less than a week, voters head to the polls. We have a winning message, one that's resonating, and one that will propel us to victory on Election Day. **We can do better._We will do better when I'm governor_. But right now, we need to fight back.** [**Tonight is our FINAL DEADLINE before Election Day. We need to raise $9,765 before midnight to meet our $75,000 goal to get out the vote: Will you donate $5 or more now to fund the fight?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379124/7ab0e2c4/7e61a988/3499bd66/2755611942/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-deadline?refcode=OHQ10318A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379124/7ab0e2c4/7e61a988/3499bd60/2755611942/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-deadline?refcode=OHQ10318A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

name: Martin Sheen
subject: A note from President Bartlet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
When a (fictional) former president sends you an email, you know it must be important... And it is.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633dea/1a8421e1/19b71e11f/4964241b/3443061696/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
When a (_fictional_) former president sends you an email, you know it must be important... And it is. [**Today, I 'm personally asking you to chip in $25 to support Democrat Tom O'Halleran, who is running in a very important race that could decide control of Congress.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b1_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") My guess is that you might remember me as President Bartlet from the "_West Wing._ " Though I no longer play a fictional president, my concerns about the way our country is heading are very real. President Trump and the Republican Congress are pushing a dangerous agenda, and the best way to stop them in their tracks is to elect a Democratic House in November. That's why I'm so excited about Tom's campaign. He is the kind of leader who always puts hard-working families first and will always fight for you, not the special interests or mega donors. [**In these final few days before Election Day, can I count on you to join me in supporting Tom with a grassroots donation of any size?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b1_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b1_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$25](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b1_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$50](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b1_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b1_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$250](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b1_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [Other](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b1_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Electing leaders like Tom is the way to get our country back on track, which is why I'm committed to doing everything I can to make that happen.

[**I 'd love it if you'd join me in this fight by pitching in what you can, as soon as you can.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b1_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,

Martin Sheen

P.S. As Bobby Kennedy said, "One heart with courage is a majority."

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b1_ms_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

If Democrats take back the House, we can stop this madness. We can stop the Republican rampage. But we can't do it without your help, team. [**Give whatever you can. And let's make sure we protect Americans from the dangerous and harmful Republican agenda.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c95/622b7b5b/1db2fe63/307b6679/3907364991/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181031am?refcode=dwse181031am_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Debbie

name: Team Donnelly
subject: closing the books
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Fourteen months ago, Joe kicked off this campaign. Six months ago, Rep. Mike Braun emerged from the Republican primary. Tonight, we're closing the books on the final full month of this race. |
---
| | Peter,

**It 's hard to believe this day is already here.**

Fourteen months ago, Joe kicked off this campaign. Six months ago, Rep. Mike Braun emerged from the Republican primary. Tonight, we're closing the books on the final full month of this race.

**[But it's not too late for you to help Joe WIN!](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2a45/7377f838/270a32a8/51ff5f02/1869590990/VEsH/ "https://joeforindiana.com/volunteer/")**

With the polls showing a DEAD HEAT, we desperately need to amp up our volunteer operation. We have 6 days left to reach every single Hoosier voter and WE NEED YOU. **[Can you spare an hour or two to volunteer for Joe?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2a45/7377f838/270a32a8/51ff5f02/1869590990/VEsE/ "https://joeforindiana.com/volunteer/")**

A week from today, this will all be over. We'll be reading the headlines, taking stock of the election results, and -- _if we fight our hardest in the time we have left_ \-- celebrating Joe's big win.

But here's a scary scenario for Halloween: **The experts are saying Joe could be in trouble.** Some of the polls have him ahead, and some have him behind. That's why we need EVERY supporter to help out now, when it counts.

**[Can you sign up to volunteer in this neck-and-neck race?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2a45/7377f838/270a32a8/51ff5f02/1869590990/VEsF/ "https://joeforindiana.com/volunteer/")**

Thanks,

Team Donnelly

| **[**DONATE!**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2a45/7377f838/270a32a8/51ff5f7d/1869590990/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-oct-eoq?refcode=20181031.1is&amount=25")**
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2a45/7377f838/270a32a8/51ff5f7c/1869590990/VEsD/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: Team Morse
subject: Don't 👻 on us—we still need volunteers for this weekend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tpJ5YxBZr-pXIrFAqB2p8W_8p7v4TZwWs4HfbaDthBo=/27KoIb2rt_8jdmL3Xwk9FzQuWLo9bzS4oxzz-JVF1ps=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20181031_TM_20181031-halloweengotv_all_logo)
Peter, Team Morse is ready for Halloween--we're seeing great costumes around our offices, and many of us are gearing up to trick-or-vote!
Halloween is also a great reminder of another door-to-door expedition we need you to make--remember to sign up for your shift this weekend to help Get Out the Vote all across the 4th District:
[SIGN ME UP ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/tpJ5YxBZr-pXIrFAqB2p8W_8p7v4TZwWs4HfbaDthBo=/UXQHJief21JjvhQkrQtslVSNGBjsAMA2kkftps8sulI=)
---

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tpJ5YxBZr-pXIrFAqB2p8W_8p7v4TZwWs4HfbaDthBo=/UXQHJief21JjvhQkrQtslVSNGBjsAMA2kkftps8sulI=)
**Remember, canvassing pays off in something even better than candy --it pays off in conversations that will move voters and help us win this race.**
In just six days, this election will be a wrap (get it? MUMMIES!)--and it would be grim indeed to wake up on November 7th wondering if we did everything we could to win.
**[_**That starts by helping to get out the vote this final weekend before Election Day. Sign up for your shift now!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/tpJ5YxBZr-pXIrFAqB2p8W_8p7v4TZwWs4HfbaDthBo=/UXQHJief21JjvhQkrQtslVSNGBjsAMA2kkftps8sulI=)**
Happy Halloween,
Team Morse

clean_body: Peter, Team Morse is ready for Halloween--we're seeing great costumes around our offices, and many of us are gearing up to trick-or-vote! Halloween is also a great reminder of another door-to-door expedition we need you to make--remember to sign up for your shift this weekend to help Get Out the Vote all across the 4th District: = = Remember, canvassing pays off in something even better than candy --it pays off in conversations that will move voters and help us win this race. In just six days, this election will be a wrap (get it? MUMMIES!)--and it would be grim indeed to wake up on November 7th wondering if we did everything we could to win. = Happy Halloween, Team Morse Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign. Jessica Morse for Congress 1079 Sunrise Ave Ste B 275 Roseville CA 95661 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please=.

name: Tori Taylor
subject: Briefing: Strategy for the last week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Ted Budd's allies in Washington are so desperate to keep him in office that they are resorting to flat-out lies. A pro-Budd PAC, America First Action, is spending nearly a million dollars on ads to s
|
---

| | Hi there -- Kathy's campaign manager here. I'm going to keep this quick because with six days to go, there is a lot happening on the ground. But as one of Kathy's strongest supporters, I wanted to brief you on our strategy for the final week of the campaign. The campaign is running full force with TV and digital ads. Our field team's phones have been on fire calling potential voters. Canvassers are leaving every hour to knock doors. It's an exciting time here at Team Kathy. [**Polling shows that this race is going to be neck-in-neck. We can win -- but only if we have the resources to last us through Election Day. Will you contribute $10 before our October deadline?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542793c/e3b7d3/5e423db6/255560a4/886663742/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181031am?refcode=kme181031am_m") I know that we email and ask you for money often. I can't tell you how much I appreciate all you have done for this campaign. [**Now, with just days to go, I am asking you again to take action and contribute.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542793c/e3b7d3/5e423db6/255560a4/886663742/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181031am?refcode=kme181031am_m") Thank you,
Tori
---

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

name: Jay Inslee
subject: I got an "F"... from the Koch brothers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Couldn't be more proud of this failing grade.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b533/2f5ea88d/7bd9c5c3/2cbd8ef3/3251752165/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-koch-brothers?utm_source=ema_2018-10-31_koch-tweet&refcode=ema_2018-10-31_koch-tweet&utm_campaign=koch-tweet&utm_medium=ema") Friend, **You know you're doing something right when you're the Koch brothers' #1 target.** I'm never going to stop fighting for progress, but we know that means corporate Republicans are going to stop at nothing to halt our movement. The highly partisan think tank that the Koch brothers founded just gave me "the worst score" of all 50 governors in America. I couldn't be more proud. I take that as a great sign that Washington is making progress on all the things they want to destroy: Clean energy solutions, a modern transportation infrastructure, decent health care, and expanding the middle class! [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b533/2f5ea88d/7bd9c5c3/2cbd8ef3/3251752165/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-koch-brothers?utm_source=ema_2018-10-31_koch-tweet&refcode=ema_2018-10-31_koch-tweet&utm_campaign=koch-tweet&utm_medium=ema") [**» If you're proud of this failing score from the Kochs as much as I am, show your support and invest in our progress today! «**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b533/2f5ea88d/7bd9c5c3/2cbd8ef3/3251752165/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-koch-brothers?utm_source=ema_2018-10-31_koch-tweet&refcode=ema_2018-10-31_koch-tweet&utm_campaign=koch-tweet&utm_medium=ema") What this means, though, is that Washington is on the Koch radar. We can count on them to try to tear down our progress at every turn. And frankly, they've got the resources to do it -- in 2018 alone they've spent tens of millions of dollars to tear down progressives across America. But I'm not too worried. The climate deniers and special-interest lobbyists may have the Kochs on their side. **But I have you -- and millions of progressive Americans -- on my side. I'll always place my bets on you.** **[**Donate $25 and let's prove to the Koch brothers that our movement is ready to take. them. on.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b533/2f5ea88d/7bd9c5c3/2cbd8ef3/3251752165/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-koch-brothers?utm_source=ema_2018-10-31_koch-tweet&refcode=ema_2018-10-31_koch-tweet&utm_campaign=koch-tweet&utm_medium=ema")** Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b533/2f5ea88d/7bd9c5c3/2cbd8ef3/3251752165/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-koch-brothers?utm_source=ema_2018-10-31_koch-tweet&refcode=ema_2018-10-31_koch-tweet&utm_campaign=koch-tweet&utm_medium=ema")
---

_Jay Inslee is leading a movement to create long-lasting progressive change in America. Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

| [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b533/2f5ea88d/7bd9c5c3/2cbd8ef2/3251752165/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-contribute-button?utm_source=ema_2018-10-31_koch-tweet&refcode=ema_2018-10-31_koch-tweet&utm_campaign=koch-tweet&utm_medium=ema")
---

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Stacey just pulled ahead, but...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
I've got good news and bad news: |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7a6/34a064cc/e9afde/70c9888/3669728729/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Hi there - I've got good news and bad news. The good news: Stacey Abrams just pulled ahead! A recent _Fox 5_ poll has us beating Kemp, 48.1% to 47.2%. The bad news: Just because we get more votes than Kemp, doesn't mean we win the election. Let me explain. In Georgia, a candidate needs to earn 50% plus one vote in order to cinch a victory.**So if we stay at our current numbers, we 're headed for a runoff election - and this race drags on into December.** We _really_ don't want that to happen, so we have some work to put in. Kemp's allies are already spending millions on this race and fighting hard to keep us from winning. Just imagine what they'll spend and do when they have no other races to pay attention to after Election Day. They're going to turn Georgia into a symbolic battleground to prove that the Trump/Kemp agenda can still win. **[If you've been waiting to sign up for a volunteer shift (or maybe multiple shifts!), I hope this news gives you the push you need. Help us win this election for Stacey Abrams in the next 6 days.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7a6/34a064cc/e9afde/70c9889/3669728729/VEsE/ "http://bit.ly/DemVolEvents")** We know for sure that victory is within reach. But unless we push hard in these final 6 days, this race is going to become a lot harder to win and a LOT more expensive. So please. Don't wait. Sign up to volunteer today. \- Lauren Groh-Wargo
Campaign Manager
#TeamAbrams
---

**[VOLUNTEER](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7a6/34a064cc/e9afde/70c9889/3669728729/VEsF/ "http://bit.ly/DemVolEvents")**

name: Molly Kelly
subject: checking in here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
Friends, with less than a week until Election Day, I need to ask you for a donation to my campaign before our triple-match opportunity expires. But first, let me explain why this is so crucial:
Chris Sununu has done nothing but prioritize his right-wing corporate special interests - like the Koch network - over New Hampshire's working families. These special interests are pouring money into this race to defeat me, keep Chris Sununu in office and, in turn, maintain their influence in the Granite State.
That's why I'm running for governor: to finally put you and your family first. And that's why President Barack Obama and Vice President Joe Biden have thrown their full support behind this campaign.
**But with just six days until Election Day, we're still $36,841 short of our most important fundraising goal of the ****campaign. ****That's why a group of donors offered to TRIPLE all gifts to help us hit our goal and win in New Hampshire and take back the corner office!**
**Friends - I'm counting on your immediate contribution: ****[_Please, will you rush $5 or more - every dollar you can before midnight tonight - to have your donation go THREE TIMES as far to win in New Hampshire and take back the corner office for Democrats?_](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4aab/d0ce7de/50cdbd78/9cdd5f6/880136185/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTkzLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk193-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
I can't thank you enough for your support.

Molly
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4aab/d0ce7de/50cdbd78/9cdd5f5/880136185/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://mollykelly.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly. This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=da06ea9b130f4708b504aa221ef293ca&_e=ggAqy7MK4QJUddG-GRonm6Nln4UDwDOSgyLtEqQI6sDTioE4n8WsDOvYoumb3OdxD7Wc0s3xTg51ehs7DJ6Jt1_-bjUjLMN3DHaBNLxNpZKiSZNM9NkHPE8SrhAYp3dCymJJFiJZJEE8qV7gBN0-bTLLnbNA-JJ0CgjwvmdhR0KRHsOmVaPFmAKsHwpbu6UuLD7WStnJ5YctWjLI7y4OQZPY3m4Svh4sdSTftW1NYdx4OKz-xLXxj3KOdj3vdLNm). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=da06ea9b130f4708b504aa221ef293ca&_e=dkW7ku2OjKR0Xzkq3CGbZ8gTf1CkhLzTAmkOc553kdnb5Xbrg2KYtZYtj9IQ-BAtrnu1Btg7mgjAtXrntXZ3SkLRtE2a_zbnIMkZEcbIw24dR8uFPC6kLclKj4Hau4RiwWE1vN_jKpP9xfEOpLkeLgFucKf852JJBGZxpU0PQSInAIzR7GU72SnoGnbpQnSbWJ3GflYjvOVxqc4C9RikyDOkl3n2bI9eICO8FEdrAPL7PxUl7pDYLGtwUKjKmvey10kuTR6ev0D8RirhWbK4iOvsxg4KZI8LlWgFXREjui-LiKo9XqLeLkOCp7UlINdwEflUdnDhXVpXOr6eHZnaN2ZJho73m1mepUOSiFFow1aBXQroFENOIhJFDbuxJx7-) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=da06ea9b130f4708b504aa221ef293ca&_e=dkW7ku2OjKR0Xzkq3CGbZ8gTf1CkhLzTAmkOc553kdngkxNvg5wEDqidc2chDoBr7kl3qlOk5-_dp9fR0Tscv4GQCoGXil6crCkYT0-OtHmCmzvCrbU1N1PR3hTdBS63TEFO9sG3E7oHs9K77jTP3f_Xh9EbbTsDxRoREB2jbpjseaL7PBibtYVyfAh0-gd4pGQWwezEdi7y8rwamZmLdUzBovLxslN6oPK9e8VbChalb-SlS4lwnyeaCK0TCVeTFbJrvr2BJlFtYUg2iGGl9XxqMWeiEecq7iDve56P75qnZCx-vYkr5r-KHFA6IV8bLESJaUYGNCNNzhfxr2C8naalx1pgWxFT4avja3R2SoiMl0SqxQd1v_QprTBZkwWD) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=da06ea9b130f4708b504aa221ef293ca&_e=dkW7ku2OjKR0Xzkq3CGbZ77ddzA3yQs8GHbAQCc8hZNtU0meI2ZIgmD-KOJlsyFjH2W6dNZvISLo04qdHEyYhYidD0Ivk0qAbkPJGXmpl8VF_qTiIl-93n3Za_6WWvd2sUlJvOMQ4j2glvMIK7YouJfeI4B06DmD2bjUKmzXY28xhWoUTHrozJR2IH_wip87Sfh087eWAYXUslkeOoZOS32lMNxI9HvGb8nPByjQoVNJte13rireY2HHvRAFDsS-plxwkZ2fWnXj9QYc6mRFEw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=da06ea9b130f4708b504aa221ef293ca&_e=dkW7ku2OjKR0Xzkq3CGbZ4qUK8JwIXTNOJT8m3zrlFNBiHMQvjIsswCDJ73iwMRfADyOkk_mhPZn3gz0xUlU-nAq6852ZtCI-DYE-sKaHspOQnUmrhQCyH2jnjXQmqGD_0AlWsGm6TWlXuNOh-MWWuWfPV_v2uqti4XRu8LFm2O4Xq-Hs9cm816jvbpblMur6MofMLnSX4uyysAlSy2JUGw86qKqWz4uShFM7z_BGLUHlVmSNP1IV29LrIg4sXY9JgXO95MDfpbWzMdNp8qRxw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=da06ea9b130f4708b504aa221ef293ca&_e=dkW7ku2OjKR0Xzkq3CGbZ8LjdYhzpUTjRfg8aygvHKR4roG_TlvfpVzfx2yqDPceFJBC5ML-sUqzu-6QDQBHBevckqJc1zWdx8hCs9G13nvUv77Br5MH8WWhGbP-w62EImHzFARU3fiFhdjvTXt6dLhjBB3HjmcW5ukcDVeVRhqG_voe6-mcu8F6odytvzM5qMR_4kOtvTrVRoW_sofrXCwr5wEW-wlfi-sQhcJiBcD-RG06Y5xxauB7noBHvFUYOA0mpmEHnJekFk7BegANZg%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=da06ea9b130f4708b504aa221ef293ca&_e=dkW7ku2OjKR0Xzkq3CGbZ8gTf1CkhLzTAmkOc553kdnT4U_rTeSlOZcDZfXWDwtlwe4fJM6RFRLHlimjj90KGBccO0UsaEuijwUQVLu8VhJwmGcUNlgyTOL57Z2zVCz4CRPN7nOQagMEAjsre1CLBV8_2zeyrLuLrZkmj7Xf3IgqETcpbV18UZMzXXpToTHf2OTOT0ioK4Ik9X_aNb_vr5XpXrgmbRi1Ie5lx2gaMhPFH5IurvYpMrqfjGGhaqaigOYAfHaeFPlfTFrLEcq6-FkgUOR4rGkR9WG5gn6zOSvWBLvtlOWaFnkp7hJ248hCVq0j0BKmp2QyWVhDkeRoKt8qWcBOtEi5Yg3KiUigGEVeh2ocFRDx4FdA6Efe-oI8IUTq72WJxv6idEI7_nZsIA%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=da06ea9b130f4708b504aa221ef293ca&_e=ggAqy7MK4QJUddG-GRonm6Nln4UDwDOSgyLtEqQI6sDTioE4n8WsDOvYoumb3OdxD7Wc0s3xTg51ehs7DJ6Jt1_-bjUjLMN3DHaBNLxNpZKiSZNM9NkHPE8SrhAYp3dCymJJFiJZJEE8qV7gBN0-bTLLnbNA-JJ0CgjwvmdhR0KRHsOmVaPFmAKsHwpbu6UuLD7WStnJ5YctWjLI7y4OQZPY3m4Svh4sdSTftW1NYdx4OKz-xLXxj3KOdj3vdLNm) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=da06ea9b130f4708b504aa221ef293ca&_e=ggAqy7MK4QJUddG-GRonm6Nln4UDwDOSgyLtEqQI6sDTioE4n8WsDOvYoumb3OdxD7Wc0s3xTg51ehs7DJ6Jt1_-bjUjLMN3DHaBNLxNpZKiSZNM9NkHPE8SrhAYp3dCymJJFiJZJEE8qV7gBN0-bTLLnbNA-JJ0CgjwvmdhR0KRHsOmVaPFmAKsHwpbu6UuLD7WStnJ5YctWjLI7y4OQZPY3m4Svh4sdSTftW1NYdx4OKz-xLXxj3KOdj3vdLNm) to unsubscribe. Friend, I know I've said it before, but we MUST reach our goals to succeed and DEFEAT Tammy Baldwin. With only 6 days until the election, we cannot afford to come up short. We need these funds - these resources - to continue our GOTV efforts leading up to Election Day. Please, chip in today to help us reach our goals and bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington. I’m counting on you, Leah \------------forwarded message below------------ ** Friend, We’re just 1 day out from our FINAL end-of-month deadline, and we’re still working hard to reach the $50K goal I set for this month. We just need to make sure we reach this goal so we can continue full steam ahead until Election Day. Please, chip in now. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Official Beto for Texas Campaign
subject: Wow, this new poll:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

A brand-new
poll came out late last night. We wanted to make sure you saw.

The poll shows Beto behind by only 3.6%, a gap we can -- and must --
close. The more shocking stat is that 5.7% of Texans polled remain
undecided between us and Ted Cruz. Whether or not we convince those folks
to swing our way all comes down to what we do in these final few days.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181031&t=1019&akid=22979%2E444211%2EUX0aou ]We’re asking now -- please send Beto an urgent
$3
donation to help us win over those last-minute voters. Your contribution
could mean the difference between us winning or losing this race.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181031&t=1020&akid=22979%2E444211%2EUX0aou ]Contribute
$3
»

Here’s what we’ll do with your contributions:

* Share Beto’s vision for Texas in television and online ads. Many
voters still haven’t heard enough about Beto. If we can reach them, we
can win.
* Mobilize hundreds of field staff and volunteers to talk to voters.
Your donations fuel the largest voter contact effort Texas has ever
seen in the last six days.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181031&t=1021&akid=22979%2E444211%2EUX0aou ]There’s never been a more important time to donate. Please contribute
$3
or whatever you can afford ahead of midnight tonight so we can close the
tiny gap between Beto and Ted Cruz.

We can’t thank all of you enough for everything you’ve given this
campaign. Thank you, thank you, thank you.

Let’s close out the next few days as strong as possible.

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181031&t=1022&akid=22979%2E444211%2EUX0aou ]Contribute
$3
»

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=22979%2E444211%2EUX0aou

P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

Hey Peter—big news!!

With the election only **6 days away** , the team has been working around the clock to meet voters throughout the district and spread Dan’s message of working across the aisle for commonsense solutions to problems that face the working families of Illinois.

But we enlisted some help to do that. We currently have 2 radio ads running across IL-03—in both English and Spanish—that discuss Dan’s time in Congress, and why he should be re-elected.

**Our radio ads are an added boost, because they can reach voters that we may not be able to when going door to door.**

Here's what you need to know, team:

Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta, made his **_biggest ad buy yet_** in the past few days, so we need to be prepared to defend Bob's record in these crucial final days of the campaign.

Barletta loves to attack Bob's record of fighting for Pennsylvania families, but we know the truth. Bob is a fighter for middle-class Pennsylvanians -- he protects our health care, defends Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security and is a firewall against the most dangerous pieces of the Trump agenda. We need to make sure that _every. single. voter._ knows that going into Election Day, and we only have _six days_ left to share Bob's message.

**It's going to take each and every one of us to show Pennsylvania voters that Bob is fighting for them. A group of donors has agreed to match up to $30,000 in donations from this grassroots network by the end of the month -- can you give $5 (becomes $10) to help spread Bob's message by midnight tonight?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. name: Team Bredesen
subject: Remember Philbert?
body:
|
#
Peter -- remember Philbert? When President Trump first came to Tennessee to campaign for Congresswoman Blackburn, he attacked someone named “Philbert” -- we’re still not sure who he was referring to exactly. Shortly after, a kitten wandered into our campaign HQ, and we couldn’t resist him. We thought the name “Philbert” felt right as we fostered him and helped him find a new home (thanks to help from many of you). Now we have an important Philbert update -- he’s made it to the polls to vote early for Phil Bredesen! We’re thankful to be counting on Philbert’s support in the final days of this campaign, but we need to know you’ll have Governor Bredesen’s back too. body:
The scariest part of this Halloween is that our election will be decided in less than a week and the stakes are high.

If we do not send new leadership to Washington that restores checks and balances our healthcare, civil rights, and environment would continue to be attacked and at risk.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump Visits Pittsburgh Synagogue to Pay Respects to Victims of Massacre
body:
West Wing Reads Logo

**

** President Trump Visits Pittsburgh Synagogue to Pay Respects to Victims of Massacre
------------------------------------------------------------
------------------------------------------------------------

Yesterday, President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump visited the Tree of Life Synagogue in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, where a gunman killed 11 Jewish Americans in the worst anti-Semitic attack in American history.

“Accompanied by Rabbi Jeffrey Myers, the president and first lady laid white roses and stones from the White House - a Jewish tradition - at the makeshift memorial outside the synagogue,” Andrew O’Reilly reports for Fox News. “Following his time at the synagogue, Trump traveled to the University of Pittsburgh Medical Center to visit the injured victims, including four police officers wounded by gunfire.”

Click here to read more. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0e4e908f13&e=3ee4985eea)

“A measure of U.S. consumer confidence rose in October to an almost two-decade high, as Americans expected economic and jobs growth to power ahead,” Sharon Nunn reports for The Wall Street Journal (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b073a3a1d3&e=3ee4985eea) . “U.S. consumer confidence rose to 137.9 in October, the highest level since September 2000.”

“There is only one solution to this – we must call out and root out anti-Semitism wherever it exists,” Special Representative for International Negotiations Jason Greenblatt writes in Fox News (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6458200990&e=3ee4985eea) about Saturday’s horrific shooting. “We must call out and root out all forms of hatred, wherever they exist. We must teach our children to love and respect one another, to fight all hatred, and to stand proud and tall.”

“There’s a rule of thumb for journalists reporting on the Palestinians: If it can’t be blamed on Israel, it isn’t news. But some rules demand to be broken,” Elliot Kaufman writes in The Wall Street Journal (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aa76fdd306&e=3ee4985eea) . Following a two-year investigation, a new report from Human Rights Watch implicates both Hamas and the Palestinian Authority in “horrific violence and repression” against their own people.

“The Department of Commerce and our National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration stand ready before, during and after any storm to help the city stay on its feet and open for business,” Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2c0bca974e&e=3ee4985eea) writes in The Post and Courier. “Behind every update, there were dedicated NOAA team members, from the pilots flying the hurricane hunters through raging storms, to forecasters in the National Hurricane Center and in local National Weather Service offices.”

Privacy Policy (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4b96494b89&e=3ee4985eea) | Contact the White House (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bc0bccb713&e=3ee4985eea) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=5fc44575f0)

The White House . 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW . Washington, DC 20500 . USA · 202-456-1111
