name: Tim Kaine
subject: The end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
You've helped me fend off attack ads and you've given me serious motivation through these tough times in the Senate and getting out to every corner of Virginia for over 370 events. -------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, this team has raised $74,238 of our $80,000 goal for tonight. It's incredible.

I know right now it's tough, many of you give to my campaign often, and there are so many worthy causes and candidates right now. But we need to reach this goal, Derek. [I know we can reach it together. But I'm going to need a little help before the book closes tonight.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1081/3e0906/75bf3661/3e371a30/3347001481/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+I+know+we+can+reach+it+together+But+Irsq&utm_campaign=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND&source=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1081/3e0906/75bf3661/3e371a37/3347001481/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND&source=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND") | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1081/3e0906/75bf3661/3e371a36/3347001481/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND&source=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND")
---
Folks are depending on us from Hampton Roads to Roanoke to Richmond. I check in with my team often to see if we have the resources to support all the House candidates in the way they deserve. [Here in Virginia, we have many House races that are dead heats right now and our turnout operation will be the difference between victory and defeat for many of them.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1081/3e0906/75bf3661/3e371a35/3347001481/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Here+in+Virginia+we+have+many+House+race&utm_campaign=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND&source=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND")

**A lot of folks are depending on us meeting this goal, Derek. This is bigger than me -- it always has been.**

You've helped me fend off attack ads and you've given me serious motivation through these tough times in the Senate and getting out to every corner of Virginia for over 370 events. **Can you help me get a little bit further with a donation today?**
[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1081/3e0906/75bf3661/3e371a34/3347001481/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND&source=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND")
---
This is it, Derek. Our last end of month fundraising deadline is tonight and then in six days we have the final dance.

Thanks for being with me, until the end.

_Tim_

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Emergency-October-Goal](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1081/3e0906/75bf3661/3e371a0b/3347001481/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+httpssecuretimkainecomEmergencyOctoberGo&utm_campaign=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND&source=20181031_2_FR_TK_last-day-LDND")

name: Team Claire Events
subject: GOTV Rally!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCaskill for Missouri
body:
It's time to get-out-the-vote, Friend! And what better way to do that than a rally with Claire and a few very special guests in Kansas City?
**We 've got to give it our all in these final days, so come get-out-the-vote and rally with us!** Special guests: Grammy-nominated musician Glenn Jones, Congressman Emanuel Cleaver, State Senator Shalonn "Kiki" Curls, and Alvin Brooks.
**Saturday, November 3, 2018
Doors open at 4:30 PM. Event starts at 5:00 PM
Gem Theatre
1615 E. 18th St., Kansas City, MO 64108
[Click here to RSVP!](http://wfc2.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=0JOXO6U4hoVuYktiGMuEczMTDK65lOKf&url=https%3A%2F%2Fevents.mobilizeamerica.io%2Fteamclaire%2Fevent%2F85319%2F)**
We all know what's at stake in this election -- **Claire is fighting tooth and nail to protect our healthcare** ; while her opponent, Josh Hawley, is part of a lawsuit that would strip protections for people with pre-existing conditions. **Time and time again Claire has fought for Missouri. Now's your chance to fight with her. You in?**
Can't wait to see you there!
Team Claire
P.S. Can't make it? **[Sign up to knock some doors this week!](http://wfc2.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=fzNrWBLYsWGiFdhIBo70YzMTDK65lOKf&url=https%3A%2F%2Fevents.mobilizeamerica.io%2Fteamclaire%2F)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the McCaskill for Missouri email list, please click here.](http://wfc2.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=t93qd4o5GsyEY%2BSTrU2CljMTDK65lOKf&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.clairemccaskill.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D10%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by McCaskill for Missouri
Contributions or gifts to McCaskill for Missouri are not tax deductible.

If you'd prefer to donate by check, you can use [this form.](http://wfc2.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=pyxkM3Kv5iaoRSrKFBzDdTMTDK65lOKf&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwfc2.wiredforchange.com%2Fo%2F8%2Fimages%2FMcCaskill_MailDonationforDigital-2018.pdf)

body:

name: Carrie Lucking
subject: Everything. We. Can.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|

Friend -
**I want you to imagine for a second that you wake up the day after Election Day and Jeff Johnson has won.** We have to do everything we can to make sure that doesn't happen.
Jeff Johnson has promised to end protections for people with pre-existing conditions. And he'll make good on that promise because he already voted to kick thousands off of health care when he was in the legislature.
Jeff Johnson promised that our schools won't get more resources, even though we know they need them. He'll also make good on that promise because he cut $622,000,000.00 in school funding in 2003.
**We 're just hours away from the FINAL end-of-the-month deadline of this campaign.** We can make sure that we do not repeat the day-after-Election-Day regrets by fully funding our campaign at this all-important time. **[_Can you please chip in with a triple-matched contribution right now?_](https://act.myngp.com/el/vcVAxgFardRLSJD5c0gIV4qkYhQ4h4DDl9xu9ICfbI0=/cBaJhJj_INml6e4i-ETOmkewY_s4oHjNrTzBZlen8h0=)**
**With millions being spent distorting Tim 's record and his vision for Minnesota, we have to do everything we can to put a stop to it. ** We'll turn the negativity and division into optimism and hope. We'll fight back with Tim and Peggy's vision for One Minnesota.

We'll fight back with Tim and Peggy's vision for One Minnesota. = If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: This campaign is a team effort. Let's win this for One Minnesota! Carrie Lucking Campaign Manager | ****=** | | Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor

name: Jason Yates
subject: Will you be there?
body:
| | You don’t want to miss it!
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSSNmw4Dl4lHkreu0yzFayyOFpQ7tXSmMPCeoDpu3I-T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181031com01&n=1)
| Peter, I’m sending you a quick reminder about the special event happening this Sunday before the midterm elections. It’s called simply, “The Event.” National faith leaders are gathering together to discuss the political issues central to our faith and the best path forward for America. Will you be there? What’s super cool is that this is a live broadcast event so you can join us from wherever you live! **Watch from home, or better yet stream the event live at your church!** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSSNmw4Dl4lHkreu0yzFayzyFsMC7WQyCzLMywZ2qTGs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181031com01&n=2)
**Sunday, November 4, 2018
****Join us for 90 Minutes**
**3pm PT | 4pm MT | 5pm CT | 6pm ET** My Faith Votes Honorary National Chairman, Governor Mike Huckabee, will speak, along with our friend Bishop E.W. Jackson and Mike Farris, President of Alliance Defending Freedom, the organization who represented Colorado baker Jack Phillips at the Supreme Court. [Sign-up to receive a reminder](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSSNmw4Dl4lHkreu0yzFayyOFpQ7tXSmMPCeoDpu3I-T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181031com01&n=3) about this free event. You will be encouraged to join with like-minded Christians across the country for this important simulcast event as we come together and prepare to vote for Biblical principles! [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSSNmw4Dl4lHkreu0yzFayzyFsMC7WQyCzLMywZ2qTGs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181031com01&n=4) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181031com01&n=5)
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181031com01&n=6).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=xVQJp8sIg0YIME9Lo-Z4syIdVRw_HYS0jEt2wMUQx2eEuRFK5ZOguLktpeYbxh9N&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181031com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FPXYBx5Xyt4ogPU1qeCocIOlLGlV2jWcvDCbIYySOYm8m4a6nxzoW0Ja2quI4O6s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181031com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GevmR3RZALWcgxRmRAu8Xs945EaPwemE7bkwg1RsifpjRSkA2HhVJBLM7TbCqLQ4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181031com01&n=9)

---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c585d76dfd334c3db548c5d7b6367d09&_e=c9Ug1AMmcjmKI1VQQSaQA5i_vv90eYgf9Rh_bQwZCbASa6Wu8e8IVMrK6cdNwi86_7WqE-WTRUqZoPQ7draaROfN8nF73WeVRTBOm4azu91RGC5sCixX9XxxTA_NkATXg7wLL5iQ20G9pDkBN5XHfigM7y09b16xqm2_UR2XU5CL16PJEiPLW98hMN4CuwlGzxw6OBKOHBZ8Kye-fDC6WQpszJ-8OyPCmZIeN-JgdQHI3ThB1jcXORNhHEQV_S4S). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c585d76dfd334c3db548c5d7b6367d09&_e=NKj2xBnYeph7kNWf-zCRXGqxaYUTOXof6-LhHk4k4qRJlW85TkXa9_KYhGoA83tRqENf0EaKQUG5LzFYR4wLbmK1O-w8MEDULErbpcS-c0V9ijTr0OMBACnjd3kX3cNIzHYvgAU6PAVvQzyvlWwrbs1cW1WTbMNwij1lKuQsmoNh0N6uOYtw601hgdsLk7sH1tTVaqhqECT--QRAag4gTbXutLe-Vcx_RiAzYChxR_uEgimUyyXE19Dn1f123eOFEVDKz52ULyMcqUDxUoGn3cLkZYfFKAt867UJ9S4EtGt_EjZxATEaQTbjykznz2QUffSYLALmrEFaQwwE5fOsMwOyu72FSDgJtDubatWjfKs1fsOjasdd2somAJoghl8u) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c585d76dfd334c3db548c5d7b6367d09&_e=NKj2xBnYeph7kNWf-zCRXGqxaYUTOXof6-LhHk4k4qRcTaqKsQ8xptllfwlS4E4bC0mzI71HGEvnsDbav8pNlWYOSf_XXsp4uWz8z5nDp36aQ0GUmr-4AuS7SaTNUo1Dhqgl7Ok-2pGNyfxbSoDeWm8lPzRpi-6g-4Hqt2h2kkZfI34xL9Eg8FXuzT1JmcUVebXSE2mSbL7HCfIXiGbeZ_r3cA2h7-wy5SPslb6cHeaUg4OSpn_QQUSMIWRnb8pi-fyl7QOBFwZBeDuoBPSs50lcoeotUH9M6On6gToji8OhzbAM_62n257x9CZ49zAbdhWwkLjj4i-OqSSSj_ba2wX4avMhp-V9yB7gf3MrvKJqQ1HYP3FqrEjcPV-HxhCh) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c585d76dfd334c3db548c5d7b6367d09&_e=NKj2xBnYeph7kNWf-zCRXKS2DkXq51OecvuRVy96dehw4uKmmj5vFBh1xHtnep-XHTfz90YgI3LyON8WhZSVO86E6pye8ntYEgr2i5GFX7adEUO2BTW_zZbdn2FmQ9wZP_b-RBDF3w9GFeEPiK0k1WCcmvGg4-H983XaD1LPCmcAxbeUJQ7uT4hUDr6pzTEnNKgHgnvZMYF764H7qIuhdMCJca0oarytT4noLzZ9tEe2de9RJLzKYW8gf4SNkYApZReSM18Wk3OTMybZqnPEtw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c585d76dfd334c3db548c5d7b6367d09&_e=NKj2xBnYeph7kNWf-zCRXDCnvha-wwj2aL50pPozjfxTU4dqtjhGaPGAhuU0btvgSlZ7pj03ytvmAPHWQnFIWzqsUKKNvaoJefHrQRidYuy6O18YBzfXfvDsd9q4rUMKG5mbOiTsElJdPCTw9Fqxbb1yRPRNeU6hb0sBJ5HuY1brTiXeGjB0vpwu1V-FxVGphBgrtrqPQJLNVh_ejOQ0_5_DkW6-LT7TXuJvowfBMCQ1441zRbtmEOry4Np_tk-K6dBwYtgDxWG_UyBPP415Nw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c585d76dfd334c3db548c5d7b6367d09&_e=NKj2xBnYeph7kNWf-zCRXJgsIJiSOfNbWgU_qbLaxkcdtNzoVvqfj64DsVr-lAClVJbuzhcTrPdxRmIlmNF4nYSq3_8ZxEg-aJdKpX1rskYrxfh7f2rASVKyzHmomJo8b46AKU0DT-OQzToPIjosfeCm8b47Q5P3N6UfWhanPbYMv_D-pODfigNEmVVscM-0V4HoISUb7Q0WbxNnBBiMNChb7GSP2N5L2WykUyhuD2DbPOt3zP4RJlXujrTWjZsLWyi0neKdPdOrKYRAnXgvLg%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c585d76dfd334c3db548c5d7b6367d09&_e=NKj2xBnYeph7kNWf-zCRXGqxaYUTOXof6-LhHk4k4qSZPl9fk_SkZb70nWzmnn5Nkuo24UA01k56ddQzEl0oh6GhqmKq8bKIcDGpQk8qHZgys9aVr5o2uL9G-HD8T6lq6ZDnCyarh3qIVCT4Iirwg5jfgPycBk4tbc1pU5__2PB4ueEGtgY5ZaMqmbOHk0-zxL413V3F3xBE9-pKF1BNPqD09AZ0KGMZNhYp0u_6JJTAxKy7yDhtGdbk6A1W3wXeosm2Omf7x7pcyGy2PeFVcdTe5eEEWFMK5675MVfT4uSzOGTKwbHdzk_jx3RD8N5o9sedd3qIXn4NJ_wBWQEwzcCUuNyP_lU-fK4MvKGtYdulA_aF47Q7up52y7QKkkm7zpg66AF2Hx1R9b3G6BpHfw%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: With righteous indignation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
This administration will stop at nothing--not even the Constitution they swore to uphold--to end citizenship for every single person born to undocumented parents or seeking refuge in this country.
#
Friends, President Trump is not above the law and certainly not above the Constitution. The president's proposal to sign an executive order that would defy the 14th Amendment is flat out wrong. The Constitution is clear: everyone born in this country is a U.S. citizen.
This administration will stop at nothing--not even the Constitution they swore to uphold--to end citizenship for every single person born to undocumented parents or seeking refuge in this country.
The only way we can stop the spread of white nationalism is with the solidarity of a diverse and engaged movement. We must leave no stone unturned to retake the House of Representatives and reverse this rapidly-accelerating slide into authoritarianism.
**[Contribute $5 today so Our Revolution can get out the vote for 33 progressive candidates for Congress who will protect and defend human rights.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a812/bed43eb/8e835c2f/75fc2ca2/700944251/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trump-eo?refcode=em181031-full&noskip=true")**
President Trump's rhetoric has emboldened hate groups like neo-Nazis and the Ku Klux Klan. He has attempted to erase transgender people entirely and plans to give American soldiers live ammunition to use on asylum seekers at our southern border. He does not believe people outside of his rich circle of friends are worthy of human rights and dignity.
Friends, here is what you can do to stop the most dangerous president in our lifetimes. There are more than 600 Our Revolution groups across the country resisting the administration's extreme policies by organizing their communities, identifying leaders, and doing the work of advancing important ballot initiatives. They are also electing progressive candidates to represent and defend us at every level of government. They have **six days** left to do it in time for the midterm election, and they need your help.
**[Pitch in $5 right now and help build, as Dr. King once said,"a true revolution of values" to reshape our politics.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a812/bed43eb/8e835c2f/75fc2ca2/700944251/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trump-eo?refcode=em181031-full&noskip=true")**
An attack on one of us is an attack on us all. Together, we must rise to this challenge for love and inclusion to prevail.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a812/bed43eb/8e835c2f/75fc2ca2/700944251/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trump-eo?refcode=em181031-full&noskip=true")**

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a812/bed43eb/8e835c2f/75fc2cac/700944251/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a812/bed43eb/8e835c2f/75fc2caf/700944251/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a812/bed43eb/8e835c2f/75fc2cae/700944251/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

"" An attack on one of us is an attack on us all. Together, we must rise to this challenge for love and inclusion to prevail. In solidarity, Nina Turner President Our Revolution "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035

name: Match Alert
subject: CRITICAL opportunity (triple match!!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
Friends: Right-wing organizations - like the Koch network and the Republican Governors Association - are _pouring_ money into New Hampshire to reelect Chris Sununu. They're desperate to keep their friend in office so they can keep getting richer at the expense of New Hampshire's working families.
**We have to do everything we can in these FINAL SIX DAYS to make sure Molly Kelly is elected governor and takes back the corner office for Democrats.**
**That's why this incredible opportunity couldn't have come at a more critical moment: A group of donors just offered to TRIPLE every dollar, up to our $50,000 goal - but right now, we're just a bit short!**
_We took a look at our records, and here is what we found:_
| | **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Supporter ID:** 16256

name: Team Gillum
subject: The most diverse state in the nation
body:
We need a leader who will fight to unite folks across the state, not divide them.
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35eb/9e00690/57f11821/24009a53/894363047/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181101_FinFR6b_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&source=em18_181101_FinFR6b_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx")
Hello --

Florida is the most diverse state in America, and that's our greatest strength.

When people from different places, beliefs, and ethnicities join together for the best interests of every Floridian, the possibilities are endless. Florida's inclusive spirit allowed Mayor Gillum -- the son of a school bus driver and construction worker -- to become the Mayor of Tallahassee, and with your help, Florida's next Governor.

Florida deserves a leader who will fight to unite folks across the state, not divide them. That's why this campaign is releasing our latest ad statewide to remind people that Florida deserves better -- and we can make it happen on November 6.

**[Watch our latest ad, "Diversity is Our Strength," and then chip in $5 to help Mayor Gillum win on November 6.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35eb/9e00690/57f11821/24009a6b/894363047/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-diversity-ad-2018?gpsid=9_55_4849&refcode=em18_181031_Divers_fnd_clq_act__&utm_campaign=em18_181031_Divers_fnd_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=9+-+Watch+our+latest+ad+Diversity+is+Our+Str")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35eb/9e00690/57f11821/24009a6a/894363047/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-diversity-ad-2018?gpsid=9_55_4849&refcode=em18_181031_Divers_fnd_clq_act__&utm_campaign=em18_181031_Divers_fnd_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=10")
---

Mayor Gillum will fight every day to build a better Florida for every person in this state -- no matter where they're from, what they look like, or who they love.

Florida deserves a leader who will make sure our families have healthcare, not rip it away. Florida deserves a leader who will pay teachers what they're worth, and Florida deserves a leader who will hold polluters accountable.

Florida can get the leader we deserve next week, we just need your help to make it happen.

**[Chip in to help elect Andrew Gillum and get Florida the leader we deserve on November 6.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35eb/9e00690/57f11821/24009a6d/894363047/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-diversity-ad-2018?gpsid=9_55_4849&refcode=em18_181031_Divers_fnd_clq_act__&utm_campaign=em18_181031_Divers_fnd_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=11+-+Chip+in+to+help+elect+Andrew+Gillum+and+")**

Bring it home,

Team Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35eb/9e00690/57f11821/24009a6c/894363047/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-diversity-ad-2018?gpsid=9_55_4849&refcode=em18_181031_Divers_fnd_clq_act__&utm_campaign=em18_181031_Divers_fnd_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=12+-+DONATE")

**P.S. If you haven't already, we need you to vote NOW.[Find your polling place today.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35eb/9e00690/57f11821/24009a6f/894363047/VEsHBg/ "https://iwillvote.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=13+-+Find+your+polling+place+today&utm_campaign=em18_181101_FinFR6b_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx&source=em18_181101_FinFR6b_fnd_gq_act__MAG_ettx")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

body:

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: Falling behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

I’ll keep this short. More than 4.1 million early votes have been cast in
Texas. Beto and Ted Cruz are neck and neck. We can win, but we need to get
every last supporter to the polls.

For us to do that, we need to hit every one of our final fundraising
goals. Unfortunately, we’ve fallen behind on our fundraising, and we need
a lot of help making up lost ground. Can Beto count on you to
contribute now?

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181031&t=1019&akid=23041%2E444211%2Ep0yTkS ]Send Beto a
$3
contribution before tonight when the time is up on our end-of-month goal.
Your contribution now could mean the difference between victory and
defeat.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181031&t=1020&akid=23041%2E444211%2Ep0yTkS ]Contribute
$3
»

As you know, we don’t have any super PACs waiting in the wings to fund our
final get-out-the-vote plan. We only rely on contributors like you --
that’s why emails like this one are so important.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181031&t=1021&akid=23041%2E444211%2Ep0yTkS ]Please make a last-minute
contribution to our end-of-month goal.

Thank you so much for everything you’ve contributed to make our campaign

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: sprinting until the polls close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
It's going to be a sprint until the polls close on November 6th, and I'm reaching out to ask for your help before one more important deadline.
| | Peter, We are 6 days out from Election Day, and with a recent poll showing me locked in a dead heat with Rep. Dave Brat, **our campaign is leaving nothing on the table.** I've been traveling the district for our "10 counties in 10 days" tour, hearing from small business owners and meeting new voters. Energy was through the roof at our get-out-the-vote rally in Orange. And our volunteers continue to knock doors all around VA-7. It's going to be a sprint until the polls close on November 6th, **and I 'm reaching out to ask for your help before one more important deadline.** October ends at midnight tonight, my team has set an ambitious fundraising goal for the month, and we will not reach it without you. [**Peter, can you make a donation right now, so we can reach our October goal and finish this race strong?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LpHxYyhVddDrNKxYXEY_sMyBxQ__A1Hy61CgrkmPvwc=/xN_0iX8e-tygzqGs3vfO-UjIeSHQOKpv1S8QuDgyayo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b3_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) I don't accept corporate PAC money, so you are the base of our support, and every dollar you contribute will go toward our important get-out-the-vote efforts. We can and will deliver a win for Central Virginia families in 6 days, but it's going to be very close. [**Your support**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LpHxYyhVddDrNKxYXEY_sMyBxQ__A1Hy61CgrkmPvwc=/xN_0iX8e-tygzqGs3vfO-UjIeSHQOKpv1S8QuDgyayo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b3_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) really will make a difference. Thanks, \- Abigail P.S. Happy Halloween to you and your families! Here's our family getting ready for trick-or-treating: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LpHxYyhVddDrNKxYXEY_sMyBxQ__A1Hy61CgrkmPvwc=/xN_0iX8e-tygzqGs3vfO-UjIeSHQOKpv1S8QuDgyayo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b3_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LpHxYyhVddDrNKxYXEY_sMyBxQ__A1Hy61CgrkmPvwc=/xN_0iX8e-tygzqGs3vfO-UjIeSHQOKpv1S8QuDgyayo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b3_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LpHxYyhVddDrNKxYXEY_sMyBxQ__A1Hy61CgrkmPvwc=/xN_0iX8e-tygzqGs3vfO-UjIeSHQOKpv1S8QuDgyayo=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/LpHxYyhVddDrNKxYXEY_sMyBxQ__A1Hy61CgrkmPvwc=/WL4DcP8606e32X0b3f1Dz18DKtDMmktGH6k3IR74Kus=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Do you have tickets the debate tomorrow night?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
On Thursday evening, I'll be debating my Republican opponent in the race for Ohio's 13th Congressional District. The debate will take place at LaBrae High School in Leavittsburg, Ohio at 6:30pm. | |
---
Folks, Tomorrow evening, I'll be debating my Republican opponent in the race for Ohio's 13th Congressional District. The debate will take place at LaBrae High School in Leavittsburg, Ohio at 6:30 PM. **We have 25 tickets to give out, and I'd love to have you in the audience! If you're interested, please contact Kim at (330) 646-8418.** You may also stream the debate at [WYTV.com](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90ae/5486deaa/24d81a0d/dcf022c/2417909438/VEsH/ "https://www.wytv.com/live-stream") or [TribToday.com](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90ae/5486deaa/24d81a0d/dcf022f/2417909438/VEsE/ "http://www.tribtoday.com/"). Hope to see you there! As always, thank you for being on Team Ryan, \-- Tim [DONATE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90ae/5486deaa/24d81a0d/dcf022e/2417909438/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_oct18?refcode=em20181031_debate_oh13")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90ae/5486deaa/24d81a0d/dcf02d1/2417909438/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90ae/5486deaa/24d81a0d/dcf02d0/2417909438/VEsD/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")

| |
---
# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90ae/5486deaa/24d81a0d/dcf02d3/2417909438/VEsA/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90ae/5486deaa/24d81a0d/dcf02d2/2417909438/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")

Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90ae/5486deaa/24d81a0d/dcf02d1/2417909438/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Team Menendez
subject: Independence (Video)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

There should be no doubt in New Jerseyans' minds about where Bob Hugin stands and who he really supports.

Here is a hint: (It's Donald Trump)

We wanted to make sure to leave no doubt about Hugin's undying support for President Trump so we are releasing a new ad in the final days of this election.

[**Check out our latest ad and then chip in $5 or more to help us spread it across New Jersey so voters know the truth about Hugin and his undying loyalty to Donald Trump.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cf6/3af3c5d/383ec164/4ec31c8f/3975548819/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-independence?gpsid=5_73_4859&refcode=em18_181031_Indep_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181031_Indep_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+Check+out+our+latest+ad+and+then+chip+in")

[](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cf6/3af3c5d/383ec164/4ec31c8e/3975548819/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-independence?gpsid=5_73_4859&refcode=em18_181031_Indep_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181031_Indep_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2") **[Donate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cf6/3af3c5d/383ec164/4ec31c81/3975548819/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-independence?gpsid=5_73_4859&refcode=em18_181031_Indep_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181031_Indep_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+Donate")** Look, it's no secret: Hugin has donated over $200,000 to Trump's campaign and super PAC, he was a Trump delegate in 2016 and even served as his New Jersey state finance chair.

Hugin supported both of Trump's Supreme Court nominees. He supported Trump's attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act. And he refused to stand up to Trump after his attacks against women and his racist and derogatory comments toward minorities across the country.

While Democratic Senator Bob Menendez will stand up to Trump, we know that Bob Hugin would just be a rubber stamp for his agenda.

[**We need to ensure that every single voter knows the truth about Hugin's support for Trump before they cast their vote on November 6th. So check out our latest ad and then chip in $5 or more to help us spread it as far as possible.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cf6/3af3c5d/383ec164/4ec31c80/3975548819/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-independence?gpsid=5_73_4859&refcode=em18_181031_Indep_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181031_Indep_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=4+-+We+need+to+ensure+that+every+single+vote")

name: Claire McCaskill
subject: do you believe, everyone?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Team, we're only one week out from this election, and I need to know: **Will you take a stand and defend Missouri's Senate seat or stay on the sidelines and let Trump and McConnell's hand-picked, extremist candidate buy his way into the Senate?**
We're out of time to fool around. The Washington Post called this race the most competitive race in the country. Josh Hawley's dark money and special interests backers are flooding the airwaves with more than $45 million to beat me.
We've got to fight with everything we've got, or we will lose.
Fundraising has slowed way down, and my team needs a groundswell of grassroots donations before tonight's end-of-month deadline. If you believe in fighting for affordable healthcare, women's rights and the middle class, I need you to show it by donating to power our grassroots campaign:
[**Please dig deep and give every dollar you can spare right now to defend Missouri's Democratic Senate seat.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1db/2a380d31/37b5514a/f16277/1513432941/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0Y21jIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMzFfTVdINENNQy1DTUNfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4cmc?refcode=e20181031_MWH4CMC-CMC_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
One more week. We can see the finish line, but there's a long way to go. We'll get there -- together. Thanks for being a part of this team.
Claire

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1db/2a380d31/37b5514a/f16270/1513432941/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0Y21jIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODEwMzFfTVdINENNQy1DTUNfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4cmc?refcode=e20181031_MWH4CMC-CMC_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Molly
subject: heard from my team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
Friends: I heard from my team - with just hours left before our triple-match midnight deadline, we're so close to hitting one of our most important fundraising goals of the campaign - but right now, we still need $9,294.
We won't cross the finish line on top and flip New Hampshire blue in just six days unless we take full advantage of this one-time match opportunity to have every dollar go three times as far.
**Unlike Chris Sununu, I 'm not accepting any donations from corporate special interests. But that means the only way to close this gap and win on Nov. 6 is if grassroots supporters like you give every dollar you can right now.**
**Friends, I wouldn 't ask unless it was absolutely critical. Please, rush whatever you can and have it tripled before tonight's midnight deadline:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4ab7/d0ce7de/50b20587/9cdd7a0/4281574749/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjQwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk240-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
I can't tell you how much I appreciate your support.
Thank you,
Molly

body:

Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.

Friends, Dems have a HISTORIC opportunity to flip the House this year. Trust me, I've been working in politics FOREVER, and big wave elections don't come around often. But this thing isn't a done deal. Republican Super PACs are dropping millions of dollars left and right to stop us and there are no signs of it letting up before Election Day. And there is ONE BIG THING you can do to help our Dems fight back: **[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b3_jc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") \-- _right now!_ \-- to Tom O'Halleran, who NEEDS to win re-election for us to win the House majority.** Tom has a big end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT, so DON'T WAIT: [**Chip in!**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b3_jc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Tom's team in Arizona is really counting on you to fight back against the special interests determined to unseat him. When I worked for President Clinton, Super PACs didn't exist, but now big donors can funnel unlimited sums of money into these outside groups to buy elections.**It 's the wild, wild west out there.** Right-wing Super PACs have already dropped tens of thousands of dollars in Tom's district, and he's the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, so you can bet that there's more where that came from. [**So, don 't wait -- CHIP IN to Tom's campaign, before time is up!**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b3_jc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, James Carville | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b3_jc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

name: Joe Sweeney, NHGOP
subject: Sign Standing & Watching Your Polls
body:
**Wednesday Evening, 10/31/2018** Derek, As of these email, we are just 6 days away from Election Day 2018. It's important to make sure our polling locations throughout the Granite State show a great presence for Republican campaigns, as well as party-designated poll challengers who assist in maintaining the integrity of our elections. We have established an [NHGOP Submission Form](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBl5S95iDKOpGx8O6ixPT6Z-2BlIykRyRQiD4SgNEhPMS1_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MjWb5KNwBkDazxkb2vn01kW5piwVxXouqufKLwhDsTw69M04yokYbKtFS2BBhq81Wbmej-2BA8SCkP6wIODRVZPeqQx1AQHf6Z-2FWzhZNGmMmHkL1-2BLELeoM81jSMq60A-2Fy6CYPUqDGQf4vp810dHYrCgg-2BA-2FN-2F9Q3a4Yfz1aNaOGy7QHkYUvJF25eFzO7LMwgzTBAZIv0DOAQ-2Brmyw9waY6SjUlWup9tIuQ5f2XmBOZgprABAVGw1ZJ0TkTzrCR0P3lab1Ch1pvT3nMOTYXwTFs-2Fw-3D-3D), which will allow our top-of-the-ticket campaigns to work with our local GOP committees on filling spots where needed across New Hampshire. On the webpage [NH.GOP/election-day](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBl5S95iDKOpGx8O6ixPT6Z-2BlIykRyRQiD4SgNEhPMS1_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MjWb5KNwBkDazxkb2vn01kW5piwVxXouqufKLwhDsTw69M04yokYbKtFS2BBhq81Wbmej-2BA8SCkP6wIODRVZPemmaLepZcL-2BY-2BgYVmS4Dj2xN3lFQQIRXEPftrK85pghCgTaIcp-2FC4jS-2F2b3m3m2Enog12gWbG5ic2IUtthcr-2FoUzRCs1HbIGwjn0X-2F1-2F8cqQUHhNzjcsPpydsgEl-2FjXd6aaZLn3CPcVu4GVDN2OsgPskORWP8G54NGWNaJGCLMkn3nr67ekTdm1vcK0WbymGSA-3D-3D) you will find a form to fill out when you want to sign up for shifts for both activities, as well as a downloadable Microsoft Excel sheet template you can fill out and email in order to submit multiple volunteers to our tracker. Together, we will secure victory up and down the ballot for New Hampshire Republicans! Let's close this cycle out strong. ****Kindest regards, Joe SweeneyNHGOP Communications Director _**Below, please find addresses for our major campaign offices - these offices can be used to pick up Election Day signs from now until the election.**_ | |

clean_body: Wednesday Evening, 10/31/2018 Derek, As of these email, we are just 6 days away from Election Day 2018. It's important to make sure our polling locations throughout the Granite State show a great presence for Republican campaigns, as well as party-designated poll challengers who assist in maintaining the integrity of our elections. We have established an , which will allow our top-of-the-ticket campaigns to work with our local GOP committees on filling spots where needed across New Hampshire. On the webpage you will find a form to fill out when you want to sign up for shifts for both activities, as well as a downloadable Microsoft Excel sheet template you can fill out and email in order to submit multiple volunteers to our tracker. Together, we will secure victory up and down the ballot for New Hampshire Republicans! Let's close this cycle out strong. **Kindest regards, Joe SweeneyNHGOP Communications Director Below, please find addresses for our major campaign offices - these offices can be used to pick up Election Day signs from now until the election. | | Sununu Campaign 92 Portsmouth Avenue Exeter, NH 603-583-5037 Negron Campaign 71 Split Brook Road Nashua, NH 603-864-8633 Edwards Campaign 540 Chestnut Street Manchester, NH 603-312-9912 | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire * 03301

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘This is the blue-collar, middle-class Trump Economy’
body:
The White House | October 31, 2018

** ‘This is the blue-collar, middle-class Trump Economy’
------------------------------------------------------------

As Larry Kudlow sat with President Donald J. Trump and Ivanka Trump in the White House State Dining Room, he revealed a telling fact about the new American economy under the Trump Administration.

“We are looking at blue-collar wage increases [that] are rising faster than white-collars,” said Kudlow, Director of President Trump’s National Economic Council. “Now, I’m not against white collars, but I’m saying this is the blue-collar, middle-class Trump Economy”—one where manufacturing and other industries that fuel prosperity in America’s heartland are thriving once again.

In the past, that wasn’t always the case. Too often, economic growth would concentrate in the hands of a wealthy few rather than lift up all American workers.

Just over three months ago, President Trump made it clear that his Administration wouldn’t let that happen during this economic boom. In July, he unveiled his Pledge to America’s Workers (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=82bf869097&e=3ee4985eea) , calling on private companies and associations to expand programs that educate, train, and reskill Americans from high-school age to near-retirement.

Ivanka Trump has helped lead the charge, traveling to more than 14 states to visit job centers and technical education programs across America. She was also instrumental in helping shepherd the Perkins Career and Technical Education Act through Congress this summer, marking the program’s first modernization in more than a decade. Perkins CTE authorizes more than $1 billion in vocational and career-focused education funding for more than 11 million American students.

Since July, more than 160 companies have answered the President’s call to invest in career-development opportunities for our workforce. This summer, Walmart pledged 1,000,000 such opportunities. IBM pledged 100,000. FedEx pledged more than 500,000. And today, President Trump announced that the total number of commitments under the Pledge now exceeds 6 million in just over 3 months.

“The previous Administration said there won’t be any more manufacturing jobs—you’re going to need a magic wand and all of that,” President Trump said today. “Well, we had the magic wand, because we have almost 600,000 manufacturing jobs since the election. And it’s going to go much, much higher than that.”

Watch: “This is the blue-collar, middle-class Trump Economy.” (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=53a05d65c9&e=3ee4985eea)

Answering the pledge: More than 6 MILLION opportunities committed (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eba672c84b&e=3ee4985eea)

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
Photo of the day

** Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
------------------------------------------------------------

President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump hand out candy to children outside the White House | October 28, 2018

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: It’s all paying off
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Wrote this from seat 9B on the United flight back to Dallas from Houston.
We then drove from DFW airport to a big rally in Irving, our 58th early
voting event over the first 9 days of polls being open.

The turnout and the energy was off the charts. That also reflects what
we’re seeing at the polls. Not only is Texas far surpassing turnout from
the last midterm election, we are on track to potentially exceed
Presidential election year levels.

From a state that has historically ranked 50th in voter turnout, that’s
huge.

And it means that all of the hard work -- all of the miles, all of the
town halls, all of the doors, all of the phone calls, all of the
volunteers we’ve connected with the voters of Texas -- it’s all paying
off.

A lot of these voters who are shattering the turnout records are voting
for the first time. You helped us reach them and get them registered. A
lot of them are voters who have never voted in a midterm in their life.
You got them off the sidelines and into the game. Some are Republicans who
will be voting for the first Democrat in their life. Others have dropped
out of voting altogether until you gave us the resources to reach them and
give them a reason to join us.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181031&t=1019&akid=23082%2E444211%2ESLAKlA ]With 6 days to go, I want your help to finish as strong as possible.
There are a lot more voters for us to reach.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181031&t=1020&akid=23082%2E444211%2ESLAKlA ]Contribute
$3
»

Keep me up on air so everyone watching TV sees our message. Keep me in
front of people as we travel the counties of Texas. Help me share the
urgency of the election of our lifetime with everyone in Texas, wherever
they are -- in person, online, on the air, wherever -- we’ve got to do
everything we can to invite everyone in Texas to decide the future of this
country.

We’re almost there -- let’s give it all we’ve got and win this.

Grateful to you for making this possible,

Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181031&t=1021&akid=23082%2E444211%2ESLAKlA ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181031footer&t=1022&akid=23082%2E444211%2ESLAKlA

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=23082%2E444211%2ESLAKlA

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923
